steps.instruction: This protocol performs a custom mass spec sample prep for up to 20 samples. --- * [Opentrons temperature module](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/hardware-modules/products/tempdeck) with [NEST 96-well PCR plate 100µl full skirt](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/verified-labware/products/nest-0-1-ml-96-well-pcr-plate-full-skirt) * [4x6 aluminum block](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/verified-labware/products/aluminum-block-set) for [NEST 1.5ml snapcap tubes](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/verified-consumables/products/nest-microcentrifuge-tubes) * [Opentrons 20µl tiprack](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-10ul-tips) * [Opentrons 300µl tiprack](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-300ul-tips) * [Opentrons P20 and P300 GEN2 single-channel electronic pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) --- 4x6 aluminum block for NEST 1.5ml snapcap tubes (slot 2) * tube D1: denaturing solution * tube D2: DTT * all other tubes: samples that will be transferred to their corresponding locations in sample plate
Input the mount side for your P300 single-channel pipette, P20 single-channel pipette, and the number of samples.
Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
